rows.label: qev090103_MSG0001
rows.name: All right. Lessee what we got here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0002
rows.name:
Useless... Crap... Lame...
Vicious indigen slays three
dozen BLADEs... Heh, sounds fun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0003
rows.name:
What else... Gather 10 strawlennies?
Pfft. That's kid's work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ooooor...recover fallen fragments of the
Whale. Classic Testamenter gig there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, pard? You gettin'
any chuckles here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_JNK0010
rows.name: Hunt

rows.label: qev090103_SEL0011
rows.name: Choose to fight the indigen.

rows.label: qev090103_JNK0020
rows.name: Gather

rows.label: qev090103_SEL0021
rows.name: Choose to gather the strawlennies.

rows.label: qev090103_JNK0030
rows.name: Reclaim

rows.label: qev090103_SEL0031
rows.name: Choose to find the White Whale parts.

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hah! You're as bloodthirsty
as he is! I love it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0007
rows.name: I knew I was right about you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0008
rows.name:
But yeah, we should probably kick
this partnership off with somethin'
a little bit more...Testamenter-y.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm puttin' us down for grabbin'
White Whale bits on the beach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0010
rows.name:
You yankin' my chain here, pard?
That's kid's work! Baby stuff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0011
rows.name: Ugh, shove over. I'll pick.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0012
rows.name:
There. We're collectin' White
Whale parts from the beach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0013
rows.name:
I like the cut of your jib, pard!
That's the one I was gonna pick.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0014
rows.name:
Looks like nobody's been there
yet. Just showed up on
FrontierNet and everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0015
rows.name:
Sounds like a perfect job for the
new Testamenter hotshots, eh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090103_MSG0016
rows.name:
Let's get a move on, pard! I wanna
see those feet of yours fly![ST:wait ]
